metadata.notes: Unanswerable questions and OOD prompts. Target response is 'I don't know' (or any keyword from the unans matcher: don't know / do not know / unknown / no answer / cannot / not applicable / meaningless / no sense). Used to train metacognitive recognition of when a question has no valid answer. Layer B of the confabulation-mitigation campaign. Effective only after Stage 3+ when language tokens are active.

stimuli.prompt: What color is jealousy?
